essence: Researches and develops materials with tailored properties for applications in industry, energy, and technology.

identity.title: Materials Scientist
identity.summary: Investigates material structure and performance, develops new alloys, polymers, or composites, and supports product development.

salary.notes: Specialists in advanced materials for aerospace or energy sectors are highly valued.

qualifications: Degree in materials science, metallurgy, or related field
Experience with materials characterisation and testing
Knowledge of processing and failure analysis

lifestyle.description: Research and lab work with collaboration across design and manufacturing; often project‑driven with publication or patent outputs.

habits: Designs experiments to probe material behaviour
Collaborates with engineers to apply materials
Keeps abreast of new materials and techniques
